name: Krish Kalathiya
bio: Hey! I'm Krish and I'm a Senior majoring in Computer Science. I grew up in Mumbai, India. I'm passionate about cool tech, gaming and Formula 1 - and before you ask, yes, my favorite driver is Max Verstappen.

name: Samarth Edlabadkar
bio: Hi! I'm Samarth, and I'm a fourth-year student studying computer science. I grew up in Chennai, India and am passionate about what I do — building in hackathons, attending events, and yapping. Fun fact: I watched over 2600 anime episodes in a single summer — my sleep schedule has never forgiven me, but my watchlist has never looked better. I firmly believe that if watching anime were a sport, I'd have a scholarship.

name: Avaneesh Kad
bio: What's up! I am Avaneesh, a second year computer science major from Pune, India. My interest lies in data. Beyond academics and work I like to play sports and go in the wild for birding!

name: Atharv Singh
bio: Hi! I'm Atharv, and I'm a student studying Computer Engineering. I'm interested in software development, AI, and robotics, and I enjoy building projects that combine hardware and software.I enjoy exploring new technologies and learning through hands-on projects. In my free time, I like coding, playing games, watching movies, and keeping up with the latest tech trends.

name: Suhani Garg
bio: Hi! I'm Suhani Garg. I am a senior majoring in Computer Science with a certificate in Software Engineering. I love to explore modern day language models and agents. I am interested in research as well. Apart from that, I am a big bookworm and I love to dance and explore new places.
